name: Ancient Warriors - Ingenious Zhuge Kong
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>智</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>諸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>葛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>孔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Wise of the Warring Flower - Zhuge Kong
desc: If this card is added from the Deck to your hand by the effect of an "Ancient Warriors" card: You can Special Summon it. When a Spell/Trap Card is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Ancient Warriors" Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; negate the activation. When a monster effect is activated while you control "Ancient Warriors - Virtuous Liu Xuan" (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Ancient Warriors" Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; negate the activation. You can only use each effect of "Ancient Warriors - Ingenious Zhuge Kong" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is added from the Deck to your hand by the effect of an "Ancient Warriors" card: You can Special Summon it. When a Spell/Trap Card is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Ancient Warriors" Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; negate the activation. When a monster effect is activated while you control "Ancient Warriors - Virtuous Liu Xuan" (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Ancient Warriors" Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; negate the activation. You can only use each effect of "Ancient Warriors - Ingenious Zhuge Kong" once per turn.
eff: If this card is added from the Deck to your hand by the effect of an "Ancient Warriors" card: You can Special Summon it. When a Spell/Trap Card is activated (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Ancient Warriors" Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; negate the activation. When a monster effect is activated while you control "Ancient Warriors - Virtuous Liu Xuan" (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Ancient Warriors" Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; negate the activation. You can only use each effect of "Ancient Warriors - Ingenious Zhuge Kong" once per turn.

action: Activates if added to the hand
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
